title: CoHelm - AI Prior Authorization for Health Plans
problem: Health plans struggle with prior authorization backlogs. Clinical staff spend hours on manual reviews. Decisions are inconsistent and slow.
solution: AI-powered prior authorization platform for health plans. Automated clinical review based on medical necessity criteria. Faster decisions with consistent application of guidelines.
technology: AI/ML for clinical review, medical necessity criteria integration
varden_fit: CRITICAL — AI-first prior auth for health plans is exactly what European insurers need.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Prior auth automation for payers is high-value. European insurers lack AI-powered tools.
